summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HabitRPG full-stack application. Backend APIs are functional with 83.3% success rate. Frontend loads correctly and signup flow works. Critical issue: test credentials from test_credentials.md are not seeded in database.

critical_bugs.issue: Test credentials (test@habitrpg.com, admin@habitrpg.com) from test_credentials.md do not exist in database
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot login with provided test accounts, blocks testing of existing user flows

security_issues.issue: Brute force protection not working as expected - should block after 5 attempts but allows 6

integration_issues.issue: After completing all 5 onboarding questions, redirect to dashboard may be delayed or not working consistently

passed_tests: Landing page load (navbar, hero, features, pricing, FAQ, footer)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality working, minor issues with test credentials and onboarding redirect)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Seed test credentials in database. The test accounts (test@habitrpg.com/Test123!, admin@habitrpg.com/Admin123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md are not present in the database. This blocks testing of existing user login flows. Also investigate onboarding completion redirect issue and brute force protection configuration.
